title: The Dead Drop Paper Impression
description: At the Huron Road mile marker, the gap between the two stones at the base is empty — but the damp earth inside holds the impression of a folded paper that was recently removed. Pressing a fresh piece of paper against the impression and holding it to a lantern reveals ghost-text transferred by pressure: the word CELLAR and what appears to be a partial route description ending in MARBLEHEAD. The paper was removed within the last two hours — the impression edges are still crisp.
